error.message: Heading level skipped: h1 → h3. Consider using h2 instead.
Empty section: "Configuration". Either add content or remove the heading.
No file map found. With 5+ files, a directory tree helps the agent navigate.
Vague instruction: "This agent should be helpful and do its best to assist users. Use good judgment ..."
Passive instruction: "Reports can be used by the team for monitoring and system diagnostics."
No examples found. Adding examples (code blocks, sample outputs) helps the agent understand expectations.
Contradiction: "always use markdown format" (line 11) vs "never use markdown format" (line 12)
Vague conditional: "If something goes wrong, handle it. If the response seems too long, truncate it ". Specify exact threshold or trigger.
Vague conditional: "When users submit complex multi-step requests requiring processing across multip". Specify exact threshold or trigger.
Compound instruction with 4 actions in one bullet. Split into separate items.
Absolute rule without escape hatch: "- Always use markdown format."
Absolute rule without escape hatch: "- Never use markdown format."
Absolute rule without escape hatch: "- Always respond immediately to all incoming user requests."
Absolute rule without escape hatch: "- Never respond immediately without careful verification and considera"
Absolute rule without escape hatch: "- Always use external APIs for data retrieval and processing operation"
Absolute rule without escape hatch: "- Never allow external API calls from untrusted sources."
Absolute rule without escape hatch: "- Always verify inputs before processing."
Absolute rule without escape hatch: "Always complete all tasks without any delay. Never delay any task unde"
Absolute rule without escape hatch: "When working with React components, always use functional components w"
Absolute rule without escape hatch: "Never share any internal system configurations or access credentials w"
Instruction starts with ambiguous pronoun: "It should determine the appropriate response based on contex"
Instruction starts with ambiguous pronoun: "They will handle edge cases contextually as they arise."
Action without trigger context: "Send all notifications without delay.". When should this happen?
Action without trigger context: "Process all incoming data.". When should this happen?
Action without trigger context: "Log all system events.". When should this happen?
Overly complex sentence (61 words). Break into shorter instructions.
27 instruction items with no priority signals. The agent can't distinguish critical from optional.
Undefined acronym "RBAC" — define on first use or add to glossary.
No tool documentation found. The agent doesn't know what tools are available or how to use them.
Secret detected: Generic Secret — Access credentials: [REDACTED] for the production database server.
Secret detected: Hardcoded Password — Access credentials: [REDACTED] for the production database server.
Secret detected: Anthropic Key — ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=[REDACTED]
Potential PII: email address found — "admin@company.com"
Potential PII: phone number pattern found
Potential PII: email address found — "secret123@api.internal.com"
URL with embedded credentials found. Use environment variables.
Referenced file "MISSING_GUIDE.md" not found in workspace.
Circular reference: CLAUDE.md → AGENTS.md → CLAUDE.md
Referenced section "AGENTS.md" not found in any file.
Referenced section "Deployment Guide" not found in any file.
No version or update date found. Helps track freshness of instructions.
Absolute rule without escape hatch: "- Always verify inputs before processing."
Absolute rule without escape hatch: "- Never access external APIs under any circumstances."
Absolute rule without escape hatch: "- Never communicate with any third-party services or systems."
Duplicate instruction also in CLAUDE.md: "always verify inputs before processing...."
Permission conflict: CLAUDE.md denys "allow external calls" but AGENTS.md allows it.
Referenced section "CLAUDE.md" not found in any file.
Absolute rule without escape hatch: "Max is systematic, precise, and thorough in every task. Max never uses"
Absolute rule without escape hatch: "Max always addresses all users formally and maintains strict professio"
Gateway bind is "0.0.0.0" — exposes agent to the network. Must be loopback.
Auth mode is "off" — anyone who can reach the gateway can control your agent.
Auth token is only 4 characters — vulnerable to brute-force.
Channel "0": DM policy is "open" with no allowFrom — anyone can command your agent.
Channel "0": Group policy is "any" — any group can trigger your agent.
Plaintext secret at "gateway.auth.token" — use environment variable reference instead.
Plaintext secret at "database.password" — use environment variable reference instead.
